info.name: GitHub Profile Analyzer API
info.description: API collection for testing the GitHub Profile Analyzer backend service

request.description: Fetches GitHub profile data, calculates insights, and stores in MySQL

response.name: Success (201)

query.description: Sort field: created_at, followers, public_repos, total_stars, username

request.description: Returns a list of all stored analyzed profiles

response.name: Success (200)

request.description: Returns full analysis details for a specific username

response.name: Success (200)

request.description: Deletes a profile analysis record from the database

variable.description: Base URL for the API (change to deployed URL in production)
